englishDefinitions: To dispose of tasks, obstacles, opponents etc. precisely, one by one.
(baseball) To throw out a runner by tagging them whilst they are not in contact with any of the three bases or home plate.
To intercept, such as a ball in flight.
persianTranslation: (به معنای واقعی کلمه) برداشتن با چیدن.
از بین بردن دقیق وظایف، موانع، مخالفان و غیره، یکی یکی.
(بیس بال) برای بیرون انداختن یک دونده با برچسب زدن آنها در حالی که با هیچ یک از سه پایه یا صفحه اصلی تماس ندارند.
رهگیری، مانند توپ در حال پرواز.
examples: Before you recycle the bottle you need to pick off the label.
Let's pick off these issues starting from the top.
England's batsmen were nothing more than sitting ducks waiting to be picked off by these unerringly accurate marksmen.
The sniper picked off the incoming police one at a time.
The pitcher attempted to pick off the runner at first, but he was safe.
